summary: Made scripts/update.sh's git checkpoint opt-in behind --checkpoint / UPDATE_CHECKPOINT=1 (default OFF), refusing with a non-zero exit and clear stderr message on a dirty tree when the opt-in is absent, and confining git add -A to that opt-in branch only. Refactored flag parsing to a single for-arg-in loop, fixing a pre-existing bug where --no-check was ignored when --update preceded it. Corrected README.md's checkpoint claim and added a docs/development.md flag cross-reference. All verification passed: bash -n clean, dirty-tree refusal confirmed on the real repo's naturally dirty tree, checkpoint/--update/--no-check flag matrix confirmed in an isolated scratch repo, and nix flake check green.

artifacts.summary: Opt-in checkpoint gate (--checkpoint / UPDATE_CHECKPOINT=1, default OFF, refuse-on-dirty otherwise) plus for-arg-in-"$@" flag parser fixing the --no-check ordering bug.
Corrected Full Update section's checkpoint claim to reflect the new opt-in default.
Added flag cross-reference to README's Full Update section.
All 3 phases marked [COMPLETED] with per-task deviation annotations for Phase 3's scratch-repo verification method.
Implementation summary with full verification results and deviation rationale.

completion_data.completion_summary: Made scripts/update.sh's automatic git checkpoint opt-in (--checkpoint / UPDATE_CHECKPOINT=1, default OFF, refuse-on-dirty-tree otherwise), fixed a pre-existing --no-check flag-ordering bug via a for-arg-in-"$@" parser refactor, and corrected README.md + docs/development.md checkpoint documentation.

next_steps: Task ready for /todo archival; no further action required.
